title: Unable to cancel subscription
review: I have tried day after day to cancel my subscription and have tried contacting support with no success.

title: Garbage product
review: This is a garbage  product  clearly was designed and published with the most minimal effort and consideration. There are obvious spelling and grammatical in every single module, which is wild for a speech app.

title: Lacking
review: Great idea for an app but poor execution. The ai it’s using is janky at best. Many issues. It tests you by having conversations but forgets why or what ur talking about the topic and asks the same questions on repeat, then gets confused too easily. Don’t waste your money, other ai’s have been much better help.

title: Fake reviews
review: The app prompts you to rate it even before you actually start using it… don’t believe the 4.5 stars

title: Will not let you try a lesson before you pay them!
review: Please don’t buy!

title: 1 star, trying too hard
review: Forced to rate the app without getting a chance to use it.

title: Scam trial
review: Tried to test it out with the trial, but it charged me $60 regardless. Nonsense.

title: A mew cominment
review: A great tool to get self confidence

title: Erratic AI
review: Interesting concept with a buggy implementation. Regularly get “something went wrong” and then the app freezes. The interactive dialogue with AI repeats itself, stutters,  and interrupts, which makes it difficult to respond. One of my responses elicited a sad, prolonged “Ohhhhhhhh” that got deeper and sadder and required a force quit.

title: Errrors
review: My app got stock on the second journey and doesn’t let me got it the next level

title: Update 6/23/2026
review:
I am a paid customer. I paid for a year.

It stopped working again when it gets to the dialogue with AI.
It says, “ something went wrong”.
I messaged the developer -Het Thummar from Seemflow about the glitch, but the same situation as previously, there was no response.

I wish there would be a support.
The app stopped working and I am not able to move forward.

Previous Issue:
It usually glitches at the dialogue section. But this time it completely stopped working.

I already reported this issue to Patter AI support. No one responded. I am not able to use this app anymore and go to the next day. Sadly they don’t care much. For 13 days it worked quite well. Day 13th has a serious glitch that doesn’t allow you to move progress and you can’t continue your lessons .

title: Great concept
review:
I think the app is pretty cool and has some interesting concepts to learn from. 

The downside is that you can’t go back to view other lessons you’ve learned. I would love to be able to go back to a previous lesson and practice the skill taught that day versus being deadlocked into the only skill they have for the particular day you open the app… if I was able to go back, this app would easily have five stars

title: Barely opened the app and already asking me for a review.
review: I haven’t even begun the training and you’re already asking me to rate it? Sure - 1 star. All apps are 1 stars until i get the chance to use it. Insane decision to ask for a review this early.

title: Very promising
review:
Looks very promising and has some strong capabilities. I really enjoy the drills and impromptu talks.

Giving 2 stars due to customer support - I sent 5 emails over 3 months on the same issue and received no single response.

title: Red flag
review: App is asking a rate before you even get to experience the app and wouldn’t allow you to skip and rate later is kinda of a red flag for me.

title: App freezes during AI
review: Paid $60 for the app only to have it freeze during every AI aspect. Makes the app useless and customer support never replies to e-mails.

title: Stopped working
review: I was using the role play sessions but the app stopped working. After giving a response, the chat froze and I couldn’t continue the lesson. This happened multiple times so I’ve deleted the app.

title: Good app
review: Been using this app daily app. would highly recommend it to anyone wanting to improve their communication skills.

title: Glitches too much
review: Regret paying an annual fee for this app only to find out I barely can go on a dialogue practice with AI because it glitches too often. It either stopped working or lagging to the point I had to close the app. It’s been a week and unfortunately I can’t get my money back.

title: Scam
review: The app advertised a 3-day free trial, but I canceled the subscription on the same day and was still charged. Very disappointing experience. I would not recommend this app.

title: Good concept, too buggy
review: Good app in theory and when it works, but the AI has been glitchy over the 3 day trial period to the point it’s unusable. Sometimes my responses don’t register, but won’t let me proceed forward in the lesson. In the practice dialogues, the AI doesn’t respond in full sentences or continues way past the 3 iterations it’s supposed too. On top of that, the copy is grammatically incorrect, leading me to question the overall quality control of this product

title: Fee
review: Apps like this shouldn’t request money, I don’t mind paying but it’s not necessary for the app itself. This app should people fix what they’re trying to fix not to increase the weight of having them pay !! Absolutely hate

title: Very bad grammar
review: The exercises are okay, but I can’t get past the horrible grammar. Why is the grammar on an AI app so bad? Especially for an app that is purporting to teach speech. Can’t AI check and correct that? It’s clearly written by a non English speaker. The cost is too high to be subpar.

title: Be careful! They trick you into buying them!!
review: At first there is a one week free trial, but when you proceed with the purchase, the free trial may disappear. At least this is what happened for me. They are not responding to cancel the charge. The app itself is not working in many places and get stuck with bugs and etc.! I’m surprised how it has gathered positive rates so far!

title: Refund
review: İ downloaded the app and it required a membership to login. However it stated that a fee would be available during the trial period. I canceled my subscription on the same day because i didn’t like the app, but I didn’t receive a refund as stated in the description.

title: Grammar/Spelling
review: Too many grammar and spelling mistakes. I have lost trust in this app and will be canceling my subscription.

title: Only free for a week
review: This app does not have a free version. It requires you to give it a rating and start a free “one week” trial before you are able to start using the app.

title: Help needed
review: Can you please reply to my mail?

title: Aggressive pricing
review: Trial converted to paid by mistake and these guys refuse to support. No response to emails or requests.

title: Fun app!
review: The exercise are short enough that I can actually stay consistent. Also the UI is pretty neat.

title: its best
review: I know its better for me,

title: Do not download you will be charged
review: I was charged before my free trial was up

title: Great app
review: I’ve been using it consistently for a few months now and the difference in how I speak is honestly noticeable. It’s one of those apps where the improvement happens gradually, but you definitely notice it after some time.

title: They shared my video wearing underwear !!!
review: Why in the world did this APP SHARE MY VIDEO I did not click on the check mark that says share yet you proceeded to share my video IM here in my underwear are you crazy?????!!!!! I would litrally sue you

title: Love the concept of this app
review: Trust me I have tried a lot of so called communication skills app. They just throw tips at you and expect you to improve your speech magically. On the contrary this app actually puts on spot and make you practice your speaking skills. Would highly recommend it everyone!

title: Best communication app
review: The daily exercises are fun and genuinely useful. Ngl, it fixed my speech, and I'm much more confident now. So far, I'm enjoying it.

title: Best speaking skills app
review: Downloaded this because a friend recommended it to me and honestly it’s one of the few apps I kept using after the first week.

title: Best Articulation app
review: Finally an app that actually helped me with my speaking skills. The exercises and the feedback are spot on. Will definitely keep using it!

title: Needs fine tuning
review: Great concept but not a great app. Freezes a lot during lessons. Lessons seem repetitive. When this gets better I’ll give it a shot in the future.

title: Love this app!
review: Honestly, I don't leave reviews, but this app has genuinely & realistically helped me with my speaking skills. Would highly recommend trying it once!

title: Scam of an app
review: I had started the free trial but did not want to continue, I had found the advice to be quite generic and not what I was looking for. When I was looking to cancel, there was nowhere that I could find an option to cancel my trial and automatically got charged. Even before my trial ended, I sent out emails to the support team and they never got back to me. I still see no option to cancel and no contact to reach the support team. I never received a refund either, even though I had submitted a request to delete my account and cancel my subscription PRIOR to the date I would be billed. Overall incredibly disappointing experience.

title: Save you money.
review: This is overly redundant, does not update and super glitchy.   Very basic development.

title: Watch out
review: Be extremely careful with App Store subscriptions. I attempted to cancel before renewal and was still charged $65. Apple denied the refund, and support said they could not manually override the decision or escalate it properly. The lack of human review for subscription disputes is incredibly frustrating.

title: Bug fest
review: It’s unusable. Constantly getting stuck. Bugs everywhere

title: Remedial and excruciatingly slow
review: You have to start from nothing and you can’t skip anything. I couldn’t get past the first lesson. It also pushes you to rate before you’ve even used it.

title: App Rating
review: Haven’t tried the app yet. May give 5 stars after it lets me try it out

title: Forced me to write review
review:
I can immediately tell it is going to attempt to make me buy something… sure enough, it did. 
Got an offer: “her’s a 60% discount” Not *HERE’S*… her’s… 🤦🏼‍♀️🤦🏼‍♀️🤦🏼‍♀️? I’m supposed to learn to articulate from a grammatically improper source? RUN!!!!

title: Learning skills
review: I like this app to improve my communication skills and speaking practices

title: App
review: App asked me to rate before I try and would not let me move forward. Need to try before I can properly rate

title: It’s good so far
review: The app works well, and I feel it will bring me some value for my communication skills. The only concern I have is the vast amount of grammatical and spelling errors I find in the written portions of the lessons. I have read some things twice and make sure it’s the proper context. This should be looked at especially for an app that is for self improvement in an area such as communication.

title: Fraudulent charge
review:
I wanted to try the app. While signing up for the free trial just now, it offered me a year subscription for $29.99 a year. I clicked it but it charged me $48.01!!! 
My trust in this app is 
now zero! I want my money back!

title: Costly
review: Lengthy setup with many questions to get you invested, then they prompt you to rate them 5 stars before you have even started using the app. Immediately after they beg for your 5 stars rating they tell you it will actually cost you $60 after the 3 day trial! No thanks!

title: Why is the app asking me to rate it when I haven’t even used it yet?
review:
I literally just installed it 

And it wouldn’t let me continue without rating it

title: Yet to start
review: Not started yet, will give Hi Eat Feedback after a week with this App

title: Buggy
review: I thought I was doing fine until the app locked me out and I got stuck on day six. Seems like other reviewers had the same problem. Too bad cuz the app had promise.

title: Redundant. Not worth the money
review: Incredibly redundant after the first couple of days. The forced waiting time in between lessons is to ensure people on trial pay before realizing this.  Just a money grab

title: Took my money but can’t use the app
review: Purchased the yearly amount but can’t use the app. Emailed twice with no answer for help. Please resolve this.

title: Cash grab
review: You have to pay before trying what a bummer.

title: Garbage
review: This app is ridden with typos. Annoying this dude ships a product this full of bugs and asks you to pay.

title: Good
review: Excelente

title: Bad buggy
review: No customer support . App hangs all the time. Horrible experience

title: Broken buggy
review: I was struck at day14 couldn’t progress . So uninstalled app to see if that fix .now I can’t login nor I’m getting refund from apple paid one year subscription to just use for  2 weeks . Official way to scam people

title: This is scam. Charged for free trial
review: They charge you for using free trial. There are better tools than this. The first three days are a trap for subscribing to yearly plan.

title: Buggy app
review: I like the role-play mode. When I try to restart a role play multiple time after 1-2 “restart” or redo the role play. The app seems to crash or hang in a loop and it never comes off

title: App is stuck when it comes to talking to AI
review: It seems that AI isn't fully integrated yet. Sometimes it starts talking like “um….. “ and nothing else happens afterward. All you can do is restart it repeatedly to complete the lesson.

title: Too soon to tell
review: I put a one because the app is asking me to rate it before using

title: Thanks
review: Great app

title: Force me to rate
review: Couldn’t even start the program without rating. May be how the rating is so high.

title: Refund 🤦‍♀️
review: What a pain trying to request a refund for an annual subscription I may have purchased in error 10 days ago. 🤦‍♀️

title: SCAM!!!!  DO NOT USE!!!
review: I clicked on Free Trial and the app immediately charged me $59.99 for a year subscription!!!  This is fraud. Also you cannot reach the developer with App Support.

title: Let’s start button way down to the screen.
review: I can’t hit that button or IPhone is prompting me to scroll up to close the app. So I can’t progress until the the app fix the issue. Money lost.

title: Review
review: Haven’t used it yet

title: Stuck on Day 8
review: I can’t move past day 8 Role play as it’s stalled on in listening but no matter how many times I tried to restart and go back to finish day 8 exercises I can’t continue and have no option to skip and move on if there is a bug or glitch, I would like to have option if the app is glitched I should be able to carry on with remaining exercises and go to next day, in general I was enjoying and have been doing the exercises but it does get stuck but next time i try it was getting resolved by itself but on day 8 role play exercise I couldn’t get thru

title: Glitches
review: At first I really enjoyed this app and felt that the charge would be worth it. However, I can’t get past a level because it is stuck in the role play. While this is frustrating, what makes even worse is you can’t go on because you have to pass the level. I’ve contacted support twice and no response.

title: Don’t fall for the free trial. They charge you anyway and refuse to refund
review: I downloaded to try for free but the app wasn’t very good. My daughter picked up my phone to use it, saw the app and clicked to purchase. On the 4th day when I realized it had been bought I contacted for a refund. They denied me. I appealed the decision and they still denied me and charged me $29.99 anyway. Very unfair and against my consumer rights.

title: Buggy and not worth money
review: This app is buggy. Every section that I've tried to use, the app just stalls, and the user experience is extremely bad. Also, I think they're just using some model to generate some very typical answers. I don't think it is about practicing your skills. The concept is good, but the quality is absolutely bad. It's a good example of hype not matching the expectation.

title: It stops at Day 3 exercise
review: App stops working at Day 3 word counts exercise. I saw other reviews mentioning the same issue. I paid for a whole year and I only got two days worth of course. That’s it. It does not move beyond the first exercise of the day 3.

title: Not working
review: after paying for the subscription, i found out that its not working. The Role Playing portion is not working, once you speak, it doesnt give feedback. can you check my account.

title: Grammar errors
review: So many grammar errors that I couldn’t even focus on the lessons. If you can’t write in English, how can I expect you to help me speak English better?

title: Not worth the money
review: this app would be explained as a quick money grab. It’s essentially someone grabbing ChatGPT or some form free AI and just giving you a format they created The whole app is created by AI not an actual person going in coding it creating it. That’s why there’s so many bad reviews. advertisements are meant to look great. They’re not there to show you their bad reviews or flaws of the app take this as a warning avoid this. There’s much better out there.

title: Scam
review:
I signed up for the 3 day free trial and immediately got charged. I canceled the free trial right away and still got charged for the full year.

Also, it’s full of grammar mistakes (even the program intro -“then” instead of “than” and many others. 

How could an app full of grammar mistakes teach you anything having to do with speaking? 

What a scam!

title: Asking for rating before using ?
review: Asking for rating before using is a sign that it might not be legit , then also it doesn’t give you any option of testing , asks you to subscribe with money option. And also asks you to let them collect random data from phone .

title: Great concept, Poor execution and support
review: The app has valuable features for improving communication skills but it suffers from reliability issues. Customer support is unresponsive and I’m currently stuck on 3rd day session that won’t progress.

title: Patterson is a yes for me
review: Seems like it is a good balance of proper coaching and constructive criticism that can help and reallly not care what others think

title: $30/mth discounted price
review: Can apps start advertising their price prior to downloading and spending 10 minutes going through an introduction of the app?

title: Not working now
review: I subscribed for over a week now. Now the app is stuck and not responding. I cannot move on lessons and make progress. I sent a request to the support team but received no response. It’s such a disappointment.

title: Effective
review: The lessons are spot on and will help you. You will become a better speaker. The problem I’ve found 3 days in is that the lessons have grammar problems. You can understand but it is distracting. And if day 3 is that flawed, will quality change at day 30 or 60?

title: Stuck at day 3
review: App is stuck for me at day 3 word counting task. It keeps giving me error. I want my money refunded as I have not heard back from support so far

title: Stuck
review: I think this app could be very helpful but I got to Day 2 Lesson 1 and the continue button was below the screen and I was unable to press it and I’m now stuck. Also the app needs ‘in app’ communication for this types of problems.

title: Onboard Quiz lies
review:
It says “83% gave the same answer” no matter what I picked. I don’t trust you.
Questions are annoying, that I can’t skip.  Sometimes the answer is sometimes.
It asked for a review before I tried it.
Forced me to click “sounds amazing”. it doesn’t.
Can’t try without starting an expensive 3 day trial.  What
a waste of my time.
Hint: all these dark patterns make you look shady.

title: Do not buy !!!!!!
review: This app is a total disaster. It glitches constantly, has broken on me two days in a row, and leaves you with zero way to complain or reach out for support. It’s beyond frustrating and a complete waste of money. Do yourself a favor and skip this mess. I think their comments are ai generated as well

title: Great
review: This app is amazing so far

title: PatterAI
review: Awesome app that is super helpful if you struggle with anything speaking, whether it’s small talk or public speaking. Definitely recommend giving it a try if you get anxious/nervous talking to new people.

title: Best Social Skills App
review: I like the idea of the app The exercises are pretty accurate and useful. Been using it for over a week now and would definitely recommend it to anyone who want to be more confident and learning how to talk to people

title: The Reminders are Ridiculous
review:
Functional app, the exercises are okay. But the notifying reminders, if you do not take the classes, or miss the days, are ridiculous, even almost violent. Who wrote them, a five year old? 
What does “If you lose your voice now, someone else will replace you” mean just days after not using the app? “Will you lose your voice forever?” Tons of stuff like that. Can’t remember them all. 

I don’t need your app to have a voice. Please work on phrasing. The speak at “Elon Level” at the beginning of usage are already signs of how juvenile the app is.

App has a lot of potential, but the team should look into juvenile and poorly thought out stuff like these.

title: Scam
review: Keeps data and costs a good chunk of $ on top of it all stay away

title: Really Cool App
review: I wasn’t really sure what to expect, but I’m really glad I found this. It’s simple to use and I feel like my communication has improved since I started using it.

title: Best app to improve your communication skills
review: I don't usually leave reviews  but this app genuinely deserves it. The rile play feature is really cool and the vocal training has even improved how i sound when i speak. Higly recommended!

title: The cooled communication app online
review: The vocal exercises are surprisingly effective, I sound clearer and more confident even on work call.

title: I love this app
review: legit app! The vocal exercises helped me so much with my voice. It's been over a week since I've been using this app and so far pretty good. would recommend it

title: Need help
review: The app seems great but I’m stuck on Day 1: Role Playing and it doesn’t let me advance. I’ve completed it but I can’t move on it only gives me the option to exit. I want to continue practicing.. could anyone help out ??

title: Scenario Language Practice
review: Came across this app scrolling through the App Store. The ability to improve my speech intrigued me. This app gives multiple ways for you to practice your speech intrigued different real life scenarios. The scenarios given are helpful in increasing confidence when talking to others.

title: Good
review: Seems legit

title: So helpful and fun!
review: Honestly didn’t expected much but this actually works. I’ve been using this app for a month now not saying I am hundred percent confident, but I am already so much improved. I even did my first public speaking last week.
